symptom_summary: Battery only lasts 4 hours after water damage incident occurred last week.
most_probable_cause: Water damage to battery or charging circuitry
reproduction_steps: Use iPhone 15 Pro normally after water exposure
Observe battery drain within 4 hours of normal usage
diagnosis_steps_taken: Check Battery Health in Settings > Battery > Battery Health & Charging
Examine liquid contact indicators in SIM tray and USB-C port
Monitor charging behavior for unusual heat or irregularities
Test device in safe mode to rule out software causes
priority_reason: Water damage can worsen over time and cause additional component failures, posing risk of complete device failure
recommended_resolution: Immediate hardware inspection and potential battery/charging circuit replacement due to water damage
